summary: The diff shows AppLayout.tsx was modified to import DebugPanel and add a 'Debug' footer toggle link with associated useState. The file summary confirms the footer Debug link toggles DebugPanel open/closed without affecting other functionality. All major requirements of REQ-6 appear to be implemented.

hallucinated_features.reason: The diff includes changes to urlParams.ts, which is unrelated to REQ-6 (adding a Debug footer link). REQ-6 only requires changes to AppLayout to add a footer Debug link — no URL parameter utilities should need modification.
